tools.name: read_message_log
tools.description: Read recent entries from the Unreal Output Log. Captures Blueprint 'Accessed None' errors, asset loading failures, C++ asserts, and other runtime messages. Use this after PIE sessions or compilation to check for issues. This is a read-only tool.

max_lines.description: Maximum number of log entries to return (1-500, default 100)

clear_after_read.description: Clear the captured log buffer after reading (default: false)
